title: polygala polygama
intro: Polygala polygama, also known as the Butterfly Pea, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia, and it belongs to the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). Traditionally, Polygala polygama has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of consuming Polygala polygama include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune system function. Polygala polygama can be prepared as a herbal tea or used in capsule form, with some cultures also using it as a natural dye due to its vibrant blue color.
